Rashid Khan Talks About Security Measures in Afghanistan

Rashid Khan Talks About Security Measures in Afghanistan

Rashid Khan, one of the world’s leading T20 spinners, recently revealed to Kevin Pietersen that he cannot walk freely in the streets of Kabul, Afghanistan. In a candid conversation, the Afghan cricket star explained the heavy security measures he has to take for his own safety, including the use of a bulletproof car. This revelation sheds light on the darker side of fame and the security risks that come with it for high-profile figures in conflict zones.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Rashid Khan Shows Remarkable Resilience: Explains Bulletproof Car Use in Afghanistan
